meaning: vt.[生]使转染,使(细胞)感染病毒核酸
examples: Objective: to stably transfect imidazoline-1 receptor (I 1r) in Chinese hamster ovary (CHO) cells.
The aim of gene therapy is to transfect DNA into target cells, in which utilizing antisense oligonucleotides is a main method.
Objective: to construct eukaryotic expression vector of human death receptor (DR5) and transfect NS-1 cells to establish stable NS-1 cell line.
